member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.ForecastPostureEvaluator
member.summary: Maps SSA lookahead vectors to decisions.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.ML.SsaTrafficForecastEngine
member.summary: In-process SSA model holder. Caches across evaluation cycles.

remarks.para: Singular Spectrum Analysis decomposes the in-memory Redis sliding window into trend, seasonal, and noise components without reading historical log files from disk—ideal for short-horizon burst forecasting during JMeter/k6 runs and live production traffic.
The engine is refit periodically (), not on every one-second tick, to keep CPU on background threads and off the Kestrel pool.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.ML.SsaTrafficForecastEngine.TryForecast(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Single},System.Single[]@)
member.summary: Produces a lookahead vector from normalized bucket counts (zeros preserved for empty slots).

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.ML.TrafficData
member.summary: ML.NET input schema: one observation of request volume per temporal bucket.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.ML.TrafficForecast
member.summary: ML.NET output schema: SSA lookahead vector (horizon buckets into the future).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.ML.TrafficForecast.Forecast
member.summary: Forecasted request counts per future bucket. Length matches configured horizon (max 300).

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineHostedService
member.summary: Background worker: queries Redis via CQRS, runs in-process ML.NET SSA, updates .

remarks.para: Hosted services run off the Kestrel thread pool, so matrix operations inside SSA never block HTTP request processing—even under concurrent JMeter/k6 burst scripts.

SSA operates purely on the live Redis sliding window; no CSV/log files are required. Each second (configurable) the worker pulls the latest bucket vector, projects 1–5 minutes forward, and adjusts protective posture ahead of reactive scale lag.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions
member.summary: Configuration for the background SSA forecasting worker (Part 3 read path).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.EvaluationIntervalMilliseconds
member.summary: How often the engine evaluates Redis metrics and updates posture (milliseconds).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.AggregateSeriesKey
member.summary: Redis series key for aggregate request velocity (all endpoints).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.WindowSizeSeconds
member.summary: Historical window pulled from Redis per evaluation cycle (seconds).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.BucketIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Width of each temporal bucket (seconds).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.WindowSize
member.summary: SSA local sub-series length (decomposition window).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.SeriesLength
member.summary: Total points supplied to SSA (e.g. last 120 one-second buckets).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.TrainSize
member.summary: Active sliding training set size (must be >= ).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.Horizon
member.summary: Forecast horizon in buckets (60–300 => 1–5 minutes ahead at 1s buckets).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.RefitEveryNCycles
member.summary: Refit the cached SSA engine every N evaluation cycles (not every tick).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.BaselineRequestsPerBucket
member.summary: Expected steady-state requests per bucket for capacity comparison.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.AlertPeakMultiplier
member.summary: Peak / baseline ratio that elevates posture to Alert.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.CriticalPeakMultiplier
member.summary: Peak / baseline ratio that elevates posture to Critical.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Analytics.PredictiveEngineOptions.AccelerationThreshold
member.summary: Minimum forecast slope (last − first) across the horizon to flag acceleration.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.Abstractions.ICommand
member.summary: Marker for a write-side CQRS message (command path).
member.remarks: Commands represent mutations on the hot telemetry path and must remain lightweight so the HTTP pipeline never waits on analytics or external stores.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.Abstractions.ICommandHandler`1
member.summary: Handles a single command type on the write path.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.Abstractions.ICommandHandler`1.HandleAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes asynchronously.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.Abstractions.IQuery`1
member.summary: Marker for a read-side CQRS message (query path) that returns .
member.remarks: Queries are consumed by background analytics—not by per-request middleware—so time-series retrieval and forecasting evaluation stay off the request critical path.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.Abstractions.IQueryHandler`2
member.summary: Handles a single query type on the read path.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.Abstractions.IQueryHandler`2.HandleAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes and returns the read model.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsDispatcher
member.summary: Intra-process CQRS dispatcher that resolves handlers from .

remarks.para: Handlers are resolved per invocation (singleton handlers are still a single instance). This avoids MediatR-style pipeline overhead while keeping registration explicit.
serves the write path; serves the read path—preserving CQRS separation at the call site.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsDispatcher.SendAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches a command to its registered .

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsDispatcher.QueryAsync``2(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches a query to its registered .

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsDispatcherFacade
member.summary: Thin wrapper that exposes through .

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Registration blueprint for intra-process CQRS handlers and the internal dispatcher.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPredictiveMiddlewareCqrs(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the CQRS dispatcher and default system state provider.
member.remarks: Register command and query handlers before the host starts, e.g.: services.AddCommandHandler<RecordTrafficTickCommand, RecordTrafficTickCommandHandler>();

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCommandHandler``2(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a singleton command handler for the write path.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.CqrsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddQueryHandler``3(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a singleton query handler for the read path.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.ICqrsDispatcher
member.summary: Public façade for dispatching CQRS messages without exposing the internal resolver.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.ICqrsDispatcher.SendAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches a command on the write path.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.CQRS.ICqrsDispatcher.QueryAsync``2(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches a query on the read path.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ISystemStateProvider
member.summary: Thread-safe, process-wide provider for protective posture and lookahead metrics.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ISystemStateProvider.GetSnapshot
member.summary: Returns a consistent snapshot of the current system state.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ISystemStateProvider.SetPosture(AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ProtectivePosture,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Updates the active protective posture.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ISystemStateProvider.SetLookaheadMetrics(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double},System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Replaces lookahead metric scores from the analytics engine.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ProtectivePosture
member.summary: System protective posture used to communicate scaling urgency to operators and policies.

member.name: F:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ProtectivePosture.Nominal
member.summary: Traffic and forecasts are within expected bounds.

member.name: F:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ProtectivePosture.Alert
member.summary: Elevated risk; proactive scaling should be evaluated.

member.name: F:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ProtectivePosture.Critical
member.summary: Imminent overload; immediate protective action is warranted.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateProvider
member.summary: Default in-memory, thread-safe implementation of .

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateSnapshot
member.summary: Immutable read model of the current protective system state.
member.param: Latest forecast or risk scores (higher = more urgent).
When the current posture was last assigned.
When lookahead scores were last refreshed.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateSnapshot.#ctor(AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.ProtectivePosture,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double},System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Immutable read model of the current protective system state.
member.param: Latest forecast or risk scores (higher = more urgent).
When the current posture was last assigned.
When lookahead scores were last refreshed.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateSnapshot.Posture
member.summary: Active protective posture.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateSnapshot.LookaheadMetricScores
member.summary: Latest forecast or risk scores (higher = more urgent).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateSnapshot.PostureChangedAtUtc
member.summary: When the current posture was last assigned.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.State.SystemStateSnapshot.MetricsEvaluatedAtUtc
member.summary: When lookahead scores were last refreshed.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Storage.ITelemetryBufferStore
member.summary: Abstract sliding-window telemetry buffer (Redis or in-memory adapters in later parts).

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Storage.ITelemetryBufferStore.IncrementMetricAsync(System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Increments a metric within a sliding window keyed by .

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Storage.ITelemetryBufferStore.GetSeriesAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns bucketed request volumes for .
member.param: Series identifier (e.g. route or aggregate key).
member.returns: Bucket counts ordered oldest to newest.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Commands.RecordTrafficTickCommand
member.summary: Write-path command: records one HTTP request tick into the sliding telemetry window.
member.remarks: Dispatched from middleware on the hot path. Handlers must complete quickly—typically a single in-memory or Redis increment—so ingress never blocks on forecasting.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Commands.RecordTrafficTickCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Write-path command: records one HTTP request tick into the sliding telemetry window.
member.remarks: Dispatched from middleware on the hot path. Handlers must complete quickly—typically a single in-memory or Redis increment—so ingress never blocks on forecasting.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Commands.RecordTrafficTickCommand.EndpointRoute
member.summary: Normalized route template or path.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Commands.RecordTrafficTickCommand.Timestamp
member.summary: Observation time (UTC recommended).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Commands.RecordTrafficTickCommand.ClientIdentifier
member.summary: Optional client or correlation identifier.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Handlers.GetTrafficTimeSeriesQueryHandler
member.summary: Read-path handler: materializes Redis sliding-window buckets for ML.NET ingestion.
member.remarks: Executes on background threads only. Zero-valued buckets represent empty temporal slots so the SSA pipeline receives a fixed-length, normalized vector without null gaps.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Handlers.GetTrafficTimeSeriesQueryHandler.NormalizeSeries(System.Int64[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Pads or truncates to a fixed bucket count; missing Redis slots remain zero.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Handlers.RecordTrafficTickCommandHandler
member.summary: Write-path handler translating into Redis increments.
member.remarks: Invoked by off the HTTP thread. Failures are logged and swallowed so Redis latency during JMeter/k6 bursts never propagates to live clients or distorts load-test latency measurements.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Handlers.TelemetryKeyFactory
member.summary: Normalizes endpoint routes into stable Redis series keys.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Logging.ITrafficTickLogger
member.summary: Logging abstraction for the write-path telemetry handler.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Logging.TrafficTickLogger
member.summary: Default backed by .

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.GetTrafficTimeSeriesQuery
member.summary: Read-path query: retrieves request-volume buckets for forecasting evaluation.
member.remarks: Executed by background analytics—not per HTTP request—so time-series assembly stays off the middleware critical path and reactive scale lag is reduced.
member.param: Total sliding window duration in seconds.
Width of each bucket in seconds.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.GetTrafficTimeSeriesQuery.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Read-path query: retrieves request-volume buckets for forecasting evaluation.
member.remarks: Executed by background analytics—not per HTTP request—so time-series assembly stays off the middleware critical path and reactive scale lag is reduced.
member.param: Total sliding window duration in seconds.
Width of each bucket in seconds.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.GetTrafficTimeSeriesQuery.WindowSizeSeconds
member.summary: Total sliding window duration in seconds.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.GetTrafficTimeSeriesQuery.BucketIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Width of each bucket in seconds.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.TrafficTimeSeriesResult
member.summary: Read-model returned by .
member.param: Request counts per bucket, ordered from oldest to newest bucket in the window.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.TrafficTimeSeriesResult.#ctor(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Read-model returned by .
member.param: Request counts per bucket, ordered from oldest to newest bucket in the window.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Queries.TrafficTimeSeriesResult.RequestVolumes
member.summary: Request counts per bucket, ordered from oldest to newest bucket in the window.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Diagnostics.IPredictiveDiagnosticsCollector
member.summary: Thread-safe counters for console diagnostics during stress validation.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Diagnostics.PredictiveDiagnosticsSnapshot
member.summary: Point-in-time diagnostics for terminal reporting.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Diagnostics.PredictiveDiagnosticsSnapshot.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int64,System.Double)
member.summary: Point-in-time diagnostics for terminal reporting.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Diagnostics.PredictiveDiagnosticsCollector
member.summary: Lock-free diagnostics aggregation for load-test observability.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Diagnostics.PredictiveDiagnosticsConsoleHostedService
member.summary: Prints predictive middleware status to the terminal every 2 seconds during stress runs.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Diagnostics.PredictiveDiagnosticsOptions
member.summary: Diagnostics console cadence.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveCommandPipelineExtensions
member.summary: Registers the Part 2 command/write pipeline: Redis store, handlers, and middleware.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveCommandPipelineExtensions.AddPredictiveCommandPipeline(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds Redis telemetry buffering, CQRS command handlers, and supporting services.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveCommandPipelineExtensions.UsePredictiveCommandPipeline(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Inserts into the HTTP pipeline. Place early (before routing/endpoints) so all requests are observed and gated.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveMitigationExtensions
member.summary: Registers Part 4 adaptive mitigations, diagnostics, and middleware integrations.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveMitigationExtensions.AddPredictiveMitigationPipeline(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds posture-driven rate limiting, cache pre-warming, and console diagnostics.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveMitigationExtensions.AddFullPredictiveMiddleware(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Full predictive stack: write path, read/forecast path, and adaptive mitigations.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveMitigationExtensions.UseFullPredictiveMiddleware(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: HTTP pipeline ordering for stress validation and production ingress.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveMitigationExtensions.UseAdaptiveRateLimiting(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Inserts adaptive token-bucket limiting after telemetry capture middleware.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveQueryPipelineExtensions
member.summary: Registers Part 3 query/read pipeline: time-series handler and SSA background worker.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveQueryPipelineExtensions.AddPredictiveQueryPipeline(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds CQRS query handlers, ML.NET SSA engine, and .

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Extensions.PredictiveQueryPipelineExtensions.AddPredictiveMiddleware(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers Part 2 (write) and Part 3 (read/forecast) pipelines together.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Infrastructure.Redis.RedisTelemetryBufferStore
member.summary: Redis implementation of using atomic INCRBY + EXPIRE.

remarks.para: Designed for high-density Apache JMeter and Grafana k6 bursts: each temporal bucket is a dedicated Redis string key shaped as {KeyPrefix}:{route}:window:{unixSeconds}. INCRBY is atomic cluster-wide, so horizontally scaled API nodes and load generators never lose increments to read-modify-write races.

EXPIRE is applied only when the bucket is first created (count transitions to 1), guaranteeing self-cleaning memory without a sweeper—critical when burst scripts create thousands of keys per minute for ML.NET velocity training in later pipeline stages.

member.name: F:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Infrastructure.Redis.RedisTelemetryBufferStore.IncrementWithExpireScript
member.summary: Atomically increments a bucket and sets TTL on first observation (single round-trip). KEYS[1] = bucket key, ARGV[1] = increment delta, ARGV[2] = expire seconds.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Infrastructure.Redis.RedisTelemetryOptions
member.summary: Configuration for Redis-backed telemetry buffering.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Infrastructure.Redis.RedisTelemetryOptions.ConnectionString
member.summary: StackExchange.Redis connection string.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Infrastructure.Redis.RedisTelemetryOptions.KeyPrefix
member.summary: Key namespace prefix (e.g. api:telemetry:v1).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Infrastructure.Redis.RedisTelemetryOptions.SlidingWindowDuration
member.summary: Sliding-window TTL applied on first increment in a temporal bucket.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.AdaptiveClientRateLimiter
member.summary: Per-client token bucket with hot-swappable limits when posture changes.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.AdaptiveMitigationCoordinator
member.summary: Monitors and applies adaptive mitigations on posture transitions.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.AdaptiveMitigationOptions
member.summary: Rate-limit and cache warm-up tuning per protective posture.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.AdaptiveMitigationOptions.WarmupCacheKeys
member.summary: Redis keys pre-loaded when posture transitions to Alert.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.AdaptiveRateLimitPolicyStore
member.summary: Thread-safe snapshot of rate limits — safe for concurrent reads from Kestrel threads.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.IAdaptiveRateLimitPolicyStore
member.summary: Thread-safe store of active rate-limit profiles driven by protective posture.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.ICachePreWarmingService
member.summary: Mock cache pre-warming: simulates DB reads and injects results into Redis before traffic spikes.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.PostureRateLimitProfile
member.summary: Immutable per-posture token-bucket limits (requests per minute).

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.PostureRateLimitProfile.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Immutable per-posture token-bucket limits (requests per minute).

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Mitigation.RedisCachePreWarmingService
member.summary: Mock pre-warming engine: loads synthetic datasets into Redis ahead of forecasted surges.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.ITelemetryIngestionQueue
member.summary: Non-blocking enqueue surface for the write path under synthetic load bursts.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.ITelemetryIngestionQueue.TryEnqueue(AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Core.Telemetry.Commands.RecordTrafficTickCommand)
member.summary: Attempts to enqueue a telemetry tick without blocking the caller.
member.returns: false when the bounded queue is saturated (tick dropped).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.ITelemetryIngestionQueue.DroppedTickCount
member.summary: Total ticks dropped because the queue was full (JMeter/k6 overload).

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.TelemetryIngestionBackgroundService
member.summary: Background fire-and-forget loop draining telemetry ticks to Redis via the command handler.
member.remarks: Decouples JMeter/k6 request threads from network latency: HTTP returns while this service performs batched handler invocations on dedicated pool threads.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.TelemetryIngestionOptions
member.summary: Tuning for high-density ingestion (e.g. Apache JMeter, Grafana k6 burst scripts).

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.TelemetryIngestionOptions.QueueCapacity
member.summary: Bounded queue capacity before ticks are dropped rather than blocking HTTP threads. Sized for short burst windows at 10k+ RPS without unbounded memory growth.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.TelemetryIngestionOptions.ConsumerCount
member.summary: Number of background consumers draining the ingestion queue.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Ingestion.TelemetryIngestionQueue
member.summary: Bounded in-process queue isolating HTTP threads from Redis I/O during load-test bursts.
member.remarks: Under JMeter/k6 scripts issuing thousands of requests per second, per-request thread-pool dispatch can exhaust workers and inflate latency. A bounded provides a fixed-memory fire-and-forget handoff.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.IPredictivePipelineMiddleware
member.summary: Contract for a composable stage in the predictive HTTP middleware pipeline.

remarks.para: The write path (command side) should perform only O(1) work—typically dispatching a —and must not block on forecasting, Redis I/O, or ML evaluation. Those concerns belong on the read/query path executed by background workers.
CQRS isolation keeps request threads from awaiting analytics: commands mutate the hot telemetry buffer; queries read time-series slices on a separate schedule.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.IPredictivePipelineMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.PredictivePipelineDelegate,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes this pipeline stage and optionally invokes .

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.IPredictiveTelemetryCapture
member.summary: Abstraction used by middleware to emit a traffic tick without coupling to CQRS wiring.
member.remarks: Implementations should enqueue or fire-and-forget a command dispatch so the ASP.NET thread returns immediately—preserving non-blocking ingress for high-frequency traffic.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.IPredictiveTelemetryCapture.CaptureAsync(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records one HTTP request observation for the predictive sliding window.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Middleware.AdaptiveRateLimitingMiddleware
member.summary: Token-bucket rate limiting with limits driven by .

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Middleware.PredictiveTrafficMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware: non-blocking telemetry writes and protective posture gating.

remarks.para: Write path (JMeter / k6 safe): Ticks are enqueued via in O(1) time. A background loop drains to Redis—HTTP threads never await network I/O, so synthetic burst scripts do not inflate P99 latency via pipeline lag.
Posture gate: is read synchronously from memory; only shedding logic runs before _next, keeping Nominal/Alert paths allocation-light.

member.name: M:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.Middleware.PredictiveTrafficMiddleware.DispatchTelemetryWrite(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Fire-and-forget enqueue: the live HTTP thread never awaits Redis or the command handler.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.PredictiveMiddlewareOptions
member.summary: Middleware behavior for protective posture gating and traffic shedding during load tests.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.PredictiveMiddlewareOptions.NonCriticalRoutePrefixes
member.summary: Route path prefixes shed with HTTP 429 when posture is .

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.PredictiveMiddlewareOptions.AlertStatusHeaderName
member.summary: Response header signaling elevated risk during Alert posture.

member.name: P:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.PredictiveMiddlewareOptions.AlertStatusHeaderValue
member.summary: Header value written when posture is Alert.

member.name: T:AIScaling.PredictiveMiddleware.Pipeline.PredictivePipelineDelegate
member.summary: Continuation delegate for the predictive HTTP middleware chain.
